The Annunciation of the Lord

readings.psalm_response: The Lord is my light and my salvation.

title: Holy Thursday - Evening Mass of the Lord's Supper

readings.psalm_response: To you, Lord, I will offer a sacrifice of praise.

title: Friday of the Passion of the Lord

readings.psalm_response: Father, into your hands I commend my spirit.

title: Holy Saturday
Easter Sunday of the Resurrection of the Lord

readings.psalm_response: This is the day the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad.

title: The Most Holy Trinity

readings.psalm_response: Blessed the people the Lord has chosen to be his own.

title: The Most Holy Body and Blood of Christ

readings.psalm_response: I will take the cup of salvation, and call on the name of the Lord.

title: The Most Sacred Heart of Jesus

readings.psalm_response: You will draw water joyfully from the springs of salvation.

title: The Immaculate Heart of the Blessed Virgin Mary

readings.psalm_response: I will sing of your salvation.

title: The Nativity of Saint John the Baptist

readings.psalm_response: I praise you, for I am wonderfully made.

readings.psalm_response: Their message goes out through all the earth.

readings.psalm_response: The queen stands at your right hand, arrayed in gold.

readings.psalm_response: Let the Lord enter; he is king of glory.

title: Mary, the Holy Mother of God

readings.psalm_response: May God bless us in his mercy.

readings.gospel_acclamation: The Word of God became flesh and made his dwelling among us, and we saw his glory.

title: The Epiphany of the Lord

readings.psalm_response: Lord, every nation on earth will adore you.

readings.gospel_acclamation: I proclaim to you good news of great joy that will be for all the people. Today a savior has been born for you.

title: The Baptism of the Lord

readings.psalm_response: O bless the Lord, my soul!

readings.gospel_acclamation: Whoever serves me must follow me, and where I am, there also will my servant be; the Father will honor whoever serves me.

title: Saint Joseph, Spouse of the Blessed Virgin Mary

readings.psalm_response: The son of David will live for ever

readings.gospel_acclamation: Jesus did this as the beginning of his signs in Cana in Galilee and so revealed his glory.

title: The Annunciation of the Lord

readings.psalm_response: Here I am, Lord; I come to do your will.

readings.gospel_acclamation: The Word of God became flesh and made his dwelling among us, and we saw his glory.

title: Friday of the Passion of the Lord

readings.psalm_response: Father, into your hands I commend my spirit.

readings.gospel_acclamation: Peace be with you; as the Father has sent me, so I send you.

title: The Most Holy Trinity

readings.gospel_acclamation: One does not live on bread alone, but on every word that comes forth from the mouth of God.

title: The Most Holy Body and Blood of Christ

readings.psalm_response: You are a priest for ever, in the line of Melchizedek.

readings.gospel_acclamation: The crowds were astonished at his teaching, for he taught them as one having authority.

title: The Nativity of Saint John the Baptist

readings.psalm_response: Rejoice in the Lord, you just!

readings.gospel_acclamation: Come after me, and I will make you fishers of men.

title: The Most Sacred Heart of Jesus

readings.psalm_response: Even though I walk in the dark valley I fear no evil; for you are at my side.

readings.gospel_acclamation: For you know the gracious act of our Lord Jesus Christ, that though he was rich, for your sake he became poor.

title: The Immaculate Heart of the Blessed Virgin Mary

readings.psalm_response: T he Lord has remembered his mercy.

readings.gospel_acclamation: You did not receive a spirit of slavery leading you back into fear, but you received a spirit of adoption.

title: The Assumption of the Blessed Virgin Mary

readings.psalm_response: The queen stands at your right hand, arrayed in gold.

readings.gospel_acclamation: The Word of God became flesh and made his dwelling among us, and we saw his glory.

title: All Saints

readings.psalm_response: Let the Lord enter; he is king of glory.

readings.gospel_acclamation: May the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ enlighten the eyes of our hearts, that we may know what is the hope that belongs to his call.

title: The Commemoration of All the Faithful Departed
Our Lord Jesus Christ, King of the Universe

readings.psalm_response: Let us go rejoicing to the house of the Lord.

readings.gospel_acclamation: I am baptizing you with water, for repentance, but the one who is coming after me is mightier than I.

title: The Immaculate Conception of the Blessed Virgin Mary

readings.psalm_response: All the ends of the earth have seen the saving power of God.

readings.gospel_acclamation: I hope in the LORD, my soul trusts in his word.

readings.psalm_response: Lord, every nation on earth will adore you.
